name: Bank Customer Churn Analysis
description: Exploratory Data Analysis using Python to identify high-risk churn factors. Discovered key correlations between revolving balances, transaction frequency, and customer attrition.

name: Netflix Content Dashboard
description: A Power BI visualization project analyzing Netflix's global content library, comparing movies vs. TV shows and identifying top-performing genres.

name: Vehicle Depreciation Analysis
description: Used Python to analyze vehicle pricing trends, identifying five distinct price decay patterns and specific mileage thresholds that impact resale value.

name: Hospitality Revenue Performance
description: Developed a professional dark-themed Power BI dashboard to track hospitality KPIs including RevPAR, ADR, and occupancy rates.
